title: What Do You Do?
description: Jobs and professions. The question 'What do you do?' really means 'What's your job?'.
summary_pt_br: Profissões em inglês + armadilha cultural: 'What do you do?' NÃO é 'o que você está fazendo?' — é 'qual é seu trabalho?'. Resposta: 'I'm a teacher' / 'I work as a chef'.

scenes.text_en:
'WHAT DO YOU DO?' Mr. Kumar asked.
'I'M A SURFER — well, not professionally,' said Bia.
'I'M A FOOD-TRUCK OWNER,' said Rafa.
'I'M A PROGRAMMER,' said Joca.
'I'M A TEACHER,' said Zara. 'Like you.'
scenes.text_pt:
'O QUE VOCÊ FAZ?' Mr. Kumar perguntou.
'SOU SURFISTA — bem, não profissional,' disse a Bia.
'SOU DONO DE FOOD TRUCK,' disse o Rafa.
'SOU PROGRAMADOR,' disse o Joca.
'SOU PROFESSORA,' disse a Zara. 'Como você.'

scenes.title: 'What do you do?' — cultural trap
scenes.body_en: 'What do you do?' is NOT 'what are you doing right now?' It means 'What's your JOB?' Answer: 'I'm a + JOB' (always 'a' / 'an'). 'I'm an engineer.' 'I'm a teacher.' To talk about where: 'I work AT [place]' or 'I work FOR [company]'.
scenes.body_pt: 'What do you do?' = qual sua profissão. NÃO é 'o que está fazendo'. Resposta: 'I'm a/an + profissão'. 'I'm a teacher'. 'I work at Google' (onde). 'I work for Google' (empresa).

examples.en: I'm a doctor. / I work at a hospital.

exercise.question: 'What do you do?' best answer:
exercise.hint_pt_br: 'What do you do' pede profissão: 'I'm a cook'.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "What Do You Do?". Jobs and professions. The question 'What do you do?' really means 'What's your job?'. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "What Do You Do?". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'What Do You Do?'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "What Do You Do?".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
